name: LED iBond International A/S
summary: LED iBond International A/S provides LED lighting solutions in Denmark. Its products include Tracy, an open platform for integrating the IoT equipment in intelligent spaces; LED iBond Kitchen; Shelly, an illuminated smart shelves; The Plane, a luminaire design that incorporates a magnetic suspension system; and elevator lighting systems, as well as shelf and rack system with integrated LED grow light for vertical farming. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Horsholm, Denmark.
